textByHash.5d297e0c829a0ca58998ae3361299f7d4e31b467: Help? No, I'll be fine now. I can sort the rest out myself.
textByHash.86b7aa30b38cf25fdb23b62cbf7d72cf05b66d0e: Well, I read a book once...
textByHash.2c34efa80f8e8d0cdc568af5afbf5949d8daa661: Nothing, but... if I go there, then I'll have failed.
textByHash.09be8cf182c714fbd4a53c87dc081288d7dbfcdc: The Great Conch, to the south east. I guess I'll join you on your boat.
textByHash.c34824100cccf6acab5bbe7d1e20b3070d42d9ff: No point wasting time I guess. I'll join you on your boat.
textByHash.3101de990c91874ad642b554c0b098eae4cf881c: You need to head [north/north west/north east/south/south west/south east.
textByHash.046d4134a2f84964cca66612aa48b65e47704537: Head to the south of the island. You can dock there.
textByHash.e75bfc0af45b86a7d899c8876619126ec52fe321: Right, we're here. I'll meet you ashore.
textByHash.60d115378c377568b342d1f2dcddb8482f483133: I'm sorry, Korel. I didn't want to come back, but...
textByHash.56b411aa49c4310ffd998a8f32b40f0bb5aef72d: I think so. I feel a lot less... like death.
textByHash.ae5dfa04ba13937e615fd70033f92bd9c00b9612: Yes, but... , what are you doing here?
textByHash.08c558e1501e5c5a5ff8a3169632a47ad78221b5: Oh, thank you, but you really don't need...
textByHash.5017d4017330090b30429049c9f51416d3d3f160: Of course, you're right. I'm sorry. I didn't mean to be rude. This is all just... a lot.
textByHash.eb7c0e59aa23432e8fe29a7376d73a93cb1296a8: You've helped enough. You don't need to trouble yourself further.
textByHash.46bc4bc9a8593f65f279ce8bb2363700f11a4291: This is going to hurt, isn't it?
textByHash.9cf5b0611f54b16664c37c362ce107baa217d414: Is it? Even if I recover, my flipper... it's gone. Without it I'm... useless...
textByHash.144774006e5c72069abf285bb58218175391135f: I can hear you, you know?
textByHash.30d926a79f2c25ad1a97a6d2372cffe5cc2d5989: Sorry, , but Raley says I need to get some rest. We'll talk later, once you've sorted out that gryphon.
textByHash.beb9ce2605425e1ab6bf0eaa92ca143b707539aa: Another gryphon attack, but this time on the Little Pearl!
textByHash.a7b04414218b755dccf6192bb5ad85772b064327: You need to get to the Pearl! We can't lose those eggs!
textByHash.ae17c8857d3bb3820e37b565ee5d594454e224f3: Did you see anything that might explain why the gryphon attacked?
textByHash.61298ed867f4e2ddc3dad59ff04a09fd8e136b14: It's... I'm not sure. It might... It might have something to do with my injury.
textByHash.f2b6fe62244374116505e962302d2a444cc93423: My captain... My crew... They betrayed me. Stabbed me with my own spear and abandoned me to the waves...
textByHash.4c3240ee55b2ade4ce709663d4221fff8bc07342: I think so... but I need time to think... I need to work out what it all means...
textByHash.8040d86df054b5579122e55fc67f519b93cd4bc6: Sorry, , but I still need to rest some more. We'll talk again soon though.
